ofsted_ratings.notes: First FE college in Yorkshire to achieve Outstanding under new EIF
Behaviour & Attitudes rated Outstanding; Apprenticeship Provider of the Year 2026
Part of Heart of Yorkshire Education Group
Adult Learning and Personal Development rated Outstanding; part of Luminate Education Group

note: From September 2024, Ofsted no longer makes an overall effectiveness judgement in inspections of state-funded schools. New framework may affect future comparisons.
